name: pyeodh

metadata.name: pyeodh
metadata.summary: A lightweight Python client for EODH APIs.

documentation:
# pyeodh

[![codecov](https://codecov.io/github/EO-DataHub/pyeodh/graph/badge.svg?token=C6RZQAUJ6I)](https://codecov.io/github/EO-DataHub/pyeodh)

> [!WARNING]
> This project is in early development and should not be used in production.

A lightweight Python client for easy access to EODH APIs.

## Installation

```
pip install pyeodh
```

## Usage

See [example notebooks](notebooks/).

## Development

Install poetry - https://python-poetry.org/docs/#installation

Install package dependencies:

```
make install
```

Run QA checks and tests:

```
make check
make test
```

To recreate all VCR cassettes run:

```
make record=rewrite test
```

or only extend with new requests by using `record=new_episodes`

functions.name: pyeodh.utils.s3_url
documentation:
Generate an S3 URL for a file in a workspace.

Args:
    workspace_name (str): Name of the workspace
    path_to_file (str): Path to file within workspace, leading '/' will be stripped

Returns:
    str: The formatted S3 URL

classes.name: pyeodh.utils.ConformanceError
documentation: Raise when the API does not coform to requested functionality.

functions.name: pyeodh.logger.set_log_level
documentation:
Set message level for logging.

Args:
    level (int): Message level, recommended to use constants provided by logging
        module.

classes.name: pyeodh.workspace.Workspace

methods.name: pyeodh.workspace.Workspace.upload_file
documentation:
Upload a file to a workspace.

Args:
    workspace_name (str): Name of the workspace
    file (str | bytes): Path to the file to upload or bytes to upload
    ws_file_path (str): Path to the file within the workspace
Contains methods for interacting with EODH workspaces.

methods.name: pyeodh.client.Client._request_raw
documentation:
Make a raw request.

Args:
    method (RequestMethod): HTTP method to use
    url (str): Target URL
    headers (Headers | None, optional): Headers to send with the request.
        Defaults to None.
    params (Params | None, optional): Query parameters to send with the request.
        Defaults to None.
    data (Any | None, optional): Raw data to send with the request. Data is
        encoded by the `encode` function before sending. Defaults to None.
    encode (Callable[[Any], tuple[str, Any]], optional): Function to encode the
        data. Has to return a tuple of (content-type string, encoded data).
        Defaults to _encode_json.

Returns:
    requests.Response: Response from the request

methods.name: pyeodh.client.Client._request_json
documentation:
Make a request and return the headers and deserialized JSON data. Input data
can be anything, not just JSON, providing an `encode` function is supplied. Use
when expecting JSON data in the response.

Args:
    method (RequestMethod): HTTP method to use
    url (str): Target URL
    headers (Headers | None, optional): Headers to send with the request.
        Defaults to None.
    params (Params | None, optional): Query parameters to send with the request.
        Defaults to None.
    data (Any | None, optional): Raw data to send with the request. Data is
        encoded by the `encode` function before sending. Defaults to None.
    encode (Callable[[Any], tuple[str, Any]], optional): Function to encode the
        data. Has to return a tuple of (content-type string, encoded data).
        Defaults to _encode_json.

Returns:
    tuple[Headers, Any]: Response headers and deserialized JSON data

methods.name: pyeodh.client.Client.get_catalog_service
documentation:
Initializes the resource catalog API client.

Calls: GET /api/catalogue/stac

Returns:
    CatalogService: Object representing the Resource catalog service.

Fetch and initialize an object from given URL.

Base class for other classes representing objects returned by EODH APIs.

classes.name: pyeodh.ades.Process

methods.name: pyeodh.ades.Process.execute_href
documentation: URL pointing to processes execution endpoint.

methods.name: pyeodh.ades.Process.execute
documentation:
Trigger process workflow execution.

Calls: POST /processes/{process_id}/execution

Args:
    inputs (dict): A dictionary containing inputs structured according to
        schema defined by the process.

Returns:
    Job: Object representing the triggered job.

methods.name: pyeodh.ades.Process.update
documentation:
Update the process workflow. `cwl_url` and `cwl_yaml` parameters are
mutually exclusive.

Calls: PUT /processes/{process_id}

Args:
    cwl_url (str | None, optional): URL pointing to the workflow CWL file.
        Defaults to None.
    cwl_yaml (str | None, optional): Content of the CWL file in yaml format.
        Defaults to None.

methods.name: pyeodh.ades.Process.delete
documentation: Delete this record.

Represents ADES Process record.

Args:
    client (Client): Instance of pyeodh request client
    headers (Headers): Response headers received when requesting this record
    data (Any): Raw response data received when requesting this record
    parent_url (str): URL of the parent API endpoint, usually `/processes`

classes.name: pyeodh.ades.Ades

documentation: URL of this record.

documentation: URL pointing to processes endpoint.

methods.name: pyeodh.ades.Ades.jobs_href
documentation: URL pointing to jobs endpoint.

methods.name: pyeodh.ades.Ades.get_processes
documentation:
Fetches available processes

Calls: GET /processes

Returns:
    list[Process]: List of available processes.

methods.name: pyeodh.ades.Ades.get_process
documentation:
Fetch an individual process

Calls: GET /processes/{process_id}

Args:
    process_id (str): Process ID

Returns:
    Process: Initialized process object.

methods.name: pyeodh.ades.Ades.deploy_process
documentation:
Deploy a process.

Calls: POST /processes

Args:
    cwl_url (str | None, optional): Location of the cwl workflow file. Mutually
        exclusive with `cwl_yaml` arg. Defaults to None.
    cwl_yaml (str | None, optional): CWL workflow in yaml format. Mutually
        exclusive with cwl_url. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    Process: The newly created process as returned by the API.

methods.name: pyeodh.ades.Ades.get_jobs

Fetches a list of jobs triggered by the user.

Calls: GET /jobs

Returns:

methods.name: pyeodh.ades.Ades.get_job
documentation:
Fetches an individual job.

Args:
    job_id (_type_): Job ID.

Returns:
    Job: Initialized job object.

Represents ADES API service.

Args:

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.Item.delete
documentation:
Delete this item.


Calls: DELETE /catalogs/{catalog_id}/collections/{collection_id}/items/{item_id}

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.Item.update
documentation:
Update this item's attributes with new values. Only provide the values you
want to update.

Calls: PUT /catalogs/{catalog_id}/collections/{collection_id}/items/{item_id}


Args:
    geometry (dict[str, Any] | None, optional): Geometry. Defaults to None.
    bbox (list[float] | None, optional): Bounding box. Defaults to None.
    datetime (Datetime | None, optional): Datetime. Defaults to None.
    properties (dict[str, Any] | None, optional): Properties. Defaults to None.
    collection (str | pystac.Collection | None, optional): Collection. Defaults
        to None.
    assets (dict[str, Any] | None, optional): Assets. Defaults to None.

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.Collection.items_href
documentation: URL pointing to items endpoint.

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.Collection.get_items
documentation:
Fetches all items within a collection.

Calls: GET /catalogs/{catalog_id}/collections/{collection_id}/items

Returns:
    PaginatedList[Item]: Iterable list of items. Automatically handles
        paginated results.

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.Collection.get_item
documentation:
Fetches a collection item.

Calls: GET /catalogs/{catalog_id}/collections/{collection_id}/items/{item_id}

Args:
    item_id (str): ID of a collection item.

Returns:
    Item: Initialized item object.

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.Collection.update
documentation:
Update collection attributes with new values. Provide only the values you
want to update.

Calls: PUT /catalogs/{catalog_id}/collections/{collection_id}


Args:
    description (str | None, optional): Description. Defaults to None.
    extent (Extent | None, optional): Extent. Defaults to None.
    title (str | None, optional): Title. Defaults to None.
    license (str | None, optional): License. Defaults to None.
    keywords (list[str] | None, optional): Keywords. Defaults to None.
    providers (list[Provider] | None, optional): Providers. Defaults to None.
    summaries (Summaries | None, optional): Summaries. Defaults to None.
    assets (dict[str, Asset] | None, optional): Assets. Defaults to None.

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.Collection.delete
documentation:
Delete this collection.

Calls: DELETE /catalogs/{catalog_id}/collections/{collection_id}

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.Collection.create_item
documentation:
Create an item as part of this collection.

Calls: POST /catalogs/{catalog_id}/collections/{collection_id}/items/{item_id}

Args:
    id (str): A unique ID.
    geometry (dict[str, Any] | None): Geometry
    bbox (list[float] | None): Bounding box
    datetime (Datetime | None): Datetime
    properties (dict[str, Any] | None): Properties
    collection (str | pystac.Collection | None, optional): ID of a parent
        collection. Defaults to None.
    assets (dict[str, Any] | None, optional): Assets. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    Item: _description_

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.Catalog.collections_href
documentation: URL pointing to collections endpoint.

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.Catalog.get_catalogs

Fetches children catalogs of this parent catalog.

Calls: GET /catalogs/{catalog_path}/catalogs

Returns:

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.Catalog.get_collections
documentation:
Fetches all resource catalog collections.

Calls: GET /catalogs/{catalog_id}/collections

Returns:
    list[Collection]: List of available collections

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.Catalog.get_collection
documentation:
Fetches a resource catalog collection.

Calls: GET /catalogs/{catalog_id}/collections/{collection_id}

Args:
    collection_id (str): ID of a collection

Returns:

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.Catalog.create_collection
documentation:
Create a new collection inside a catalog.

Calls: POST /catalogs/{catalog_id}/collections

Args:
    id (str)
    description (str)
    extent (Extent)
    title (str | None, optional): Defaults to None.
    license (str | None, optional): Defaults to None.
    keywords (list[str] | None, optional): Defaults to None.
    providers (list[Provider] | None, optional): Defaults to None.
    summaries (Summaries | None, optional): Defaults to None.
    assets (dict[str, Asset] | None, optional): Defaults to None.

Returns:
    Collection: An initialized collection object.

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.Catalog.update
documentation:
Updates catalog.

Calls: PUT /catalogs/{catalog_id}

Args:
    description (str | None, optional): New description.  Defaults to None.
    title (str | None, optional): New title. Defaults to None.

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.Catalog.delete
documentation:
Delete this catalog.

Calls: DELETE /catalogs/{catalog_id}

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.CatalogService.get_collections

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.CatalogService.get_catalogs

Fetches all catalogs.

Returns:

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.CatalogService.create_catalog
documentation:
Creates a new catalog

Calls: POST /catalogs

Args:

    description (str): Catalog description
    title (str | None, optional): Catalog title. Defaults to None.

Returns:

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.CatalogService.collection_search
documentation:
Searches the catalog for collections.

Args:
    limit (int, optional): Number of results per page. Defaults to
        consts.PAGINATION_LIMIT.
    bbox (list[Any] | None, optional): Bounding box. Defaults to None.
    datetime (str | None, optional): Datetime. Defaults to None.
    query (str | None, optional): Query string. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    PaginatedList[Collection]: Iterable list of collections.

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.CatalogService.discovery_search
documentation:
Searches the catalog for catalogs and collections.

Args:
    limit (int, optional): Number of results per page. Defaults to
        consts.PAGINATION_LIMIT.
    query (str | None, optional): Query string. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    PaginatedList[Collection]: Iterable list of collections.

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.CatalogService.get_conformance
documentation:
Fetches list of standards the API conforms to.

Calls: GET /conformance

Returns:

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.CatalogService.ping
documentation:
Pings API.

Calls: GET /_mgmt/ping

Returns:
    str | None: Pong.

methods.name: pyeodh.resource_catalog.CatalogService.check_conforms_to
documentation:
Test if API conforms to a specification.

Args:
    conformance_uri (str | Conformance): URI of the specification

Returns:
    bool
